Updates

DaydreamX v2.2.0 brings fixes & static support.

What's New:

  • Redone Settings. Appearance is better suited and easier to manage.
  • Static Deployment: You can now build and deploy your applications statically with ease.
  • SVG access: you can now access a version of this exact site by index.svg
  • Devtools fixed

Thank you to all our beta testers for their valuable feedback!

DaydreamX v2.1.0 brings important bug fixes and new features to improve your browsing experience.

What's New:

  • Bug Fixes: Addressed numerous issues from user testing including bookmark URL handling, history page icons, tab management, and more.
  • Partial Chii Implementation: Initial integration of Chii devtools for advanced debugging capabilities.
  • 700 Mullvad Locations: Added support for 700 Mullvad VPN server locations for enhanced privacy and performance.
  • Improved Extension System: Fixed hide/unhide functionality for better extension management.
  • Enhanced Search Logic: Improved URL detection with period and space handling.

Thank you to all our beta testers for their valuable feedback!

We are excited to announce the release of DaydreamX v2, a major update that brings a host of new features, performance improvements, and a sleek new user interface. This version is designed to enhance your experience and provide more customization options.

Key Features:

  • Revamped User Interface: A modern and intuitive design that makes navigation easier and more enjoyable.
  • Performance Enhancements: Faster load times and smoother transitions for a seamless experience.
  • New Customization Options: More themes, layouts, and settings.
  • Improved Security: Enhanced proxy features and backend.
  • Bug Fixes: Addressed and fixed various issues and improved overall stability.

Thanks for supporting DaydreamX, - Amplify, Crllect, and Dust

No announcements found
